questionHtml:
An alpha particle (He24) of initial energy 5.5 MeV moves towards the centre of a nucleus of gold‑197 (Au79197).

What is the distance of closest approach of the alpha particle?


A.  1.0 × 10−13 m

B.  4.1 × 10−14 m

C.  2.1 × 10−14 m

D.  6.6 × 10−33 m

meta.title: An alpha particle (He24) of initial energy 5.5 MeV moves towards the centre of a nucleus of gold‑197 (Au79197). What is the distance of closest approach of the alpha particle? A. 1
